headline: Therapists save 2 hours daily with AI.
primary_text:
When was the last time you left work on time?

For most therapists, the answer is "I can't remember." Because even after your last session ends, there's still 90 minutes of notes waiting for you.

JotPsych gives you those hours back. Record your session, and our AI generates your full clinical documentation while you move on with your day. One therapist told us she cried the first week — not from stress, but from relief.

Ready to see how it works?
